summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 25 open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No GitHub mutations, merges, fix PRs, or closeouts are planned; each PR is kept as an independent work item pending normal maintainer review, author follow-up, proof, or CI/review resolution.

actions.reason: Independent cron fix candidate; no duplicate/superseded evidence and no mutating action is allowed.
